    Complex.abs (HLsum_vonMangoldt N α) ≤ C * (N : ℝ) / (Real.log N) ^ A

axioms_detected.name: minorArcContribution_negligible
axioms_detected.declaration: axiom minorArcContribution_negligible (n N : ℕ) (hN : N ≥ n) :
axioms_detected.context:
Complex.abs (HLsum_vonMangoldt N α) ≤ C * (N : ℝ) / (Real.log N) ^ A

/-- La integral sobre arcos menores es negligible -/
axiom minorArcContribution_negligible (n N : ℕ) (hN : N ≥ n) :
  ∃ C > 0,
    Complex.abs (∫ α in MinorArcs N, (HLsum_vonMangoldt N α) ^ 2 *
      Complex.exp (-2 * Real.pi * I * α * n))

axiom majorArcs_measurable (N : ℕ) : MeasurableSet (MajorArcs N)

Future work: Prove this from explicit construction of H_ε.

axioms_detected.name: D_equals_classical
axioms_detected.context:
2. The infinite products coincide
    3. Both satisfy the same functional equation and growth bounds
-/
axiom D_equals_classical :
    ∀ s : ℂ, D s =

axioms_detected.name: spectralProjection
axioms_detected.context:
This represents the orthogonal projection onto the spectral subspace
of a self-adjoint operator H_Ψ corresponding to eigenvalues in Ω.
-/
axiom spectralProjection
    (H_psi : BoundedOp H)
    (Omega : Set ℝ) :
    BoundedOp H

axioms_detected.name: spectralProjection_isOrthogonal
axioms_detected.context:
BoundedOp H

/-- The spectral projection is an orthogonal projection. -/
axiom spectralProjection_isOrthogonal
    (H_psi : BoundedOp H)
    (Omega : Set ℝ) :
    IsOrthogonalProjection (spectralProjection H_psi Omega)

axioms_detected.name: spectralProjection_empty
axioms_detected.context:
IsOrthogonalProjection (spectralProjection H_psi Omega)

/-- The spectral projection onto ∅ is the zero operator. -/
axiom spectralProjection_empty
    (H_psi : BoundedOp H) :
    spectralProjection H_psi ∅ = 0

axioms_detected.name: spectralProjection_univ
axioms_detected.context:
spectralProjection H_psi ∅ = 0

/-- The spectral projection onto ℝ (full spectrum) is the identity. -/
axiom spectralProjection_univ
    (H_psi : BoundedOp H) :
    spectralProjection H_psi Set.univ = ContinuousLinearMap.id ℂ H

axioms_detected.name: spectralProjection_disjoint

    P_{Ω₁} ∘ P_{Ω₂} = 0 when Ω₁ ∩ Ω₂ = ∅. -/
axiom spectralProjection_disjoint
    (H_psi : BoundedOp H)
    (Omega1 Omega2 : Set ℝ)
    (h : Disjoint Omega1 Omega2) :

    (H_psi : BoundedOp H)
    (Omega1 Omega2 : Set ℝ)
    (h : Omega1 ⊆ Omega2)

axiom eigenvector_orthogonal

axioms_detected.name: eigenvalue_equation

axiom eigenvalue_equation
    (H_psi : BoundedOp H) (n : ℕ) :
    H_psi (eigenvector H_psi n) =
    (eigenvalue H_psi n : ℂ) • eigenvector H_psi n

axioms_detected.name: spectralRH_criterion
axioms_detected.context:
/-- Spectral RH criterion: if all eigenvalues of H_Ψ lie on the
    critical value 1/2, then P_{Re=½} = I. -/

    (H_psi : BoundedOp H)
    (h : ∀ n : ℕ, eigenvalue H_psi n = (1 : ℝ) / 2) :
    criticalLineProjection H_psi = ContinuousLinearMap.id ℂ H
